Field deployment
30 Daysof Dahl

A forever-running daily discipline tracker. Check off the daily loadout, bank the streak, survive the 30-day protocol. The log runs forever — the protocol is the crucible.

Built for the phone in your pocket, not the screen you're looking at. It works here too — but the real thing installs to your home screen and runs fully offline.

Deploy to your phone
kiande.com
